data.name: Amount_Source
data.value: Errors raised when performing operations that combine monetary Amount values.

data.name: Bank_Source
data.value: Errors raised while validating an uploaded bank statement file against its declared metadata (statement period and totals).

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Title
data.value: Amount currency mismatch

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Description
data.value: This error occurs when trying to use multiple amounts together in an operation while they are expressed in different currencies.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Rule
data.value: All monetary operations must involve amounts expressed in the same currency.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_ShortMessage
data.value: Currency mismatch

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Cause1
data.value: Amounts were used in a monetary operation without having been converted to the same currency.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Hint1
data.value: Verify whether all amounts involved in the operation were converted to a common currency before being used together.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Cause2
data.value: Amounts expected to be expressed in the same currency were provided with different currencies.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Hint2
data.value: Check the currencies associated with each amount and confirm whether a common currency was expected for this operation.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Title
data.value: Transaction date outside statement period

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Description
data.value: This error occurs when trying to validate a bank statement file that contains one or more transactions dated outside the statement period.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Rule
data.value: All transactions must occur within the statement period.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_ShortMessage
data.value: Transaction date is outside the statement period.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Cause1
data.value: The transaction date provided in the statement file is incorrect or inconsistent with the actual transaction date.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Hint1
data.value: Verify the transaction date present in the input file and confirm its consistency with the actual transaction timeline.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Cause2
data.value: The statement period defined in the file does not match the actual coverage period of the transactions.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Hint2
data.value: Check whether the statement start and end dates in the file align with the period covered by the transactions.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Cause3
data.value: The transaction was posted after the statement was generated but was mistakenly included in the file.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Hint3
data.value: Determine whether late-posted transactions were included in the statement generation process.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Cause4
data.value: An internal processing error caused the transaction date to be shifted during data transformation or import.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Hint4
data.value: Examine the data import and transformation stages to confirm that transaction dates are preserved without alteration.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Title
data.value: Statement total amount mismatch

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Description
data.value: This error occurs when trying to validate a bank statement file whose declared total amount does not match the sum of the individual transaction amounts.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Rule
data.value: The statement total amount must equal the sum of all transaction amounts included in the statement.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_ShortMessage
data.value: Statement total amount mismatch.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Cause1
data.value: The total amount declared in the statement file does not match the sum of the individual transaction amounts.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Hint1
data.value: Verify the declared total amount in the file and compare it with the sum of all transaction amounts.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Cause2
data.value: One or more transactions are missing or duplicated in the statement file.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Hint2
data.value: Check whether all expected transactions are present exactly once in the statement file.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Cause3
data.value: A rounding or precision error occurred when calculating the statement total amount.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Hint3
data.value: Examine how rounding and precision rules were applied when computing the statement total.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Cause4
data.value: An internal processing error altered transaction amounts during file parsing or transformation.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Hint4
data.value: Inspect the file parsing and transformation stages to confirm that transaction amounts remain unchanged.

data.name: Bank_TransactionDate_Context
data.value: The date of the transaction being processed.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_Source
data.value: Errors raised while validating a money transfer between accounts.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_AmountNotPositive_Title
data.value: Non-positive transfer amount

data.name: MoneyTransfer_AmountNotPositive_Description
data.value: This error occurs when a money transfer is requested with an amount that is zero or negative.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_AmountNotPositive_Rule
data.value: A money transfer amount must be strictly positive.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_AmountNotPositive_Cause1
data.value: The amount was entered or computed as zero or a negative value.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_AmountNotPositive_Hint1
data.value: Check the requested transfer amount and confirm it is greater than zero.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_AmountNotPositive_ShortMessage
data.value: Transfer amount must be positive.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_Invalid_Title
data.value: Invalid money transfer

data.name: MoneyTransfer_Invalid_Description
data.value: This error aggregates every domain rule violated while validating a money transfer, so the caller sees all the problems at once rather than one at a time.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_Invalid_Rule
data.value: A money transfer must satisfy every domain rule (a strictly positive amount, matching currencies, ...).

data.name: MoneyTransfer_Invalid_Cause1
data.value: One or more domain rules were violated by the requested transfer.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_Invalid_Hint1
data.value: Inspect the aggregated inner errors to see each individual rule violation.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_Invalid_ShortMessage
data.value: Invalid money transfer.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_TransferAmount_Context
data.value: The monetary amount of the attempted transfer.

data.name: StatementUpload_Source
data.value: Errors raised by the HTTP endpoint that ingests uploaded bank statements (an incoming, primary-port adapter).

data.name: StatementUpload_Malformed_Title
data.value: Malformed statement payload

data.name: StatementUpload_Malformed_Description
data.value: This error occurs when the statement upload endpoint receives a request whose body is missing a required field or carries an invalid value.

data.name: StatementUpload_Malformed_Rule
data.value: An uploaded statement request must carry every required field with a valid value.

data.name: StatementUpload_Malformed_Cause1
data.value: The client sent an incomplete or malformed request body.

data.name: StatementUpload_Malformed_Hint1
data.value: Inspect the field named in the context and confirm the client sends it with a valid value.

data.name: StatementUpload_Malformed_ShortMessage
data.value: Malformed statement payload.

data.name: StatementUpload_RateLimited_Title
data.value: Statement upload rate-limited

data.name: StatementUpload_RateLimited_Description
data.value: This error occurs when too many statement uploads arrive in a short window and the endpoint throttles the request. It is transient: the same request can be retried later.

data.name: StatementUpload_RateLimited_Rule
data.value: Callers must stay within the endpoint's upload rate limit.

data.name: StatementUpload_RateLimited_Cause1
data.value: The caller exceeded the allowed request rate.

data.name: StatementUpload_RateLimited_Hint1
data.value: Back off and retry after the delay indicated in the message.

data.name: StatementUpload_RateLimited_ShortMessage
data.value: Statement upload rate-limited.

data.name: StatementUpload_RequestId_Context
data.value: The identifier of the incoming request.

data.name: StatementUpload_Field_Context
data.value: The request field that failed validation.

data.name: ExchangeRate_Source
data.value: Errors raised while calling the external exchange-rate provider (an outgoing, secondary-port adapter).

data.name: ExchangeRate_ServiceUnavailable_Title
data.value: Exchange-rate service unavailable

data.name: ExchangeRate_ServiceUnavailable_Description
data.value: This error occurs when the external exchange-rate provider cannot be reached (a timeout, a connection reset, or a 5xx response). It is transient: the call can be retried.

data.name: ExchangeRate_ServiceUnavailable_Rule
data.value: Currency conversion depends on a reachable exchange-rate provider.

data.name: ExchangeRate_ServiceUnavailable_Cause1
data.value: The provider timed out or returned a server error.

data.name: ExchangeRate_ServiceUnavailable_Hint1
data.value: Check the provider's health and retry the call, ideally with a backoff.

data.name: ExchangeRate_ServiceUnavailable_Cause2
data.value: The outgoing network path to the provider is disrupted.

data.name: ExchangeRate_ServiceUnavailable_Hint2
data.value: Verify outbound connectivity and any proxy or firewall between the service and the provider.

data.name: ExchangeRate_ServiceUnavailable_ShortMessage
data.value: Exchange-rate service unavailable.

data.name: ExchangeRate_UnsupportedPair_Title
data.value: Unsupported currency pair

data.name: ExchangeRate_UnsupportedPair_Description
data.value: This error occurs when the exchange-rate provider does not quote a rate for the requested source/target currency pair.

data.name: ExchangeRate_UnsupportedPair_Rule
data.value: A currency conversion can only be performed for a pair the provider quotes.

data.name: ExchangeRate_UnsupportedPair_Cause1
data.value: The requested currency pair is not offered by the provider.

data.name: ExchangeRate_UnsupportedPair_Hint1
data.value: Confirm the provider supports both the source and target currencies before requesting a conversion.

data.name: ExchangeRate_UnsupportedPair_ShortMessage
data.value: Unsupported currency pair.

data.name: ExchangeRate_Provider_Context
data.value: The external provider that was called.

data.name: ExchangeRate_CorrelationId_Context
data.value: The correlation identifier of the outgoing call.

data.name: ExchangeRate_FromCurrency_Context
data.value: The source currency of the conversion.

data.name: ExchangeRate_ToCurrency_Context
data.value: The target currency of the conversion.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_DetailedMessage
data.value: The two amounts use different currencies and cannot be combined.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_DetailedMessage
data.value: A transaction date falls outside the statement period.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_DetailedMessage
data.value: The declared statement total does not match the computed total.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_AmountNotPositive_DetailedMessage
data.value: The transfer amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: MoneyTransfer_Invalid_DetailedMessage
data.value: The money transfer does not satisfy all the required rules.

data.name: StatementUpload_Malformed_DetailedMessage
data.value: The uploaded statement request is missing a required field or contains an invalid value.

data.name: StatementUpload_RateLimited_DetailedMessage
data.value: Too many statement uploads were sent in a short period; please retry later.

data.name: ExchangeRate_ServiceUnavailable_DetailedMessage
data.value: The exchange-rate service is temporarily unavailable; please retry later.

data.name: ExchangeRate_UnsupportedPair_DetailedMessage
data.value: The requested currency pair is not supported.
